trans-unit.source: Cannot find product with order detail id %id%.
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće pronaći proizvod s ID-om detalja narudžbe %id%.

trans-unit.source: Cannot merge into shipment "%id%" because it has already been shipped.
trans-unit.target: Ne može se spojiti s pošiljkom "%id%" jer je već poslana.

trans-unit.source: Cannot merge products to shipment with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće spojiti proizvode s pošiljkom s ID-om "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Cannot merge shipment "%id%" because it has already been shipped.
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće spojiti pošiljku "%id%" jer je već poslana.

trans-unit.source: Cannot split the shipment "%id%" because it has already been shipped.
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće podijeliti pošiljku "%id%" jer je već poslana.

trans-unit.source: Could not find carrier with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće pronaći operatera s ID-om "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Could not find shipment for order id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće pronaći pošiljku za ID narudžbe "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Could not find shipment for order with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće pronaći pošiljku za narudžbu s ID-om "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Could not find shipment with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće pronaći pošiljku s ID-om "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Could not save shipment update with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Nije moguće sačuvati ažuriranje pošiljke s ID-om "%id%".

trans-unit.source: Failed to delete products from shipment with id "%id%".
trans-unit.target: Brisanje proizvoda iz pošiljke s ID-om "%id%" nije uspjelo.

trans-unit.source: Order detail with id %id% does not exist in source shipment.
trans-unit.target: Detalji narudžbe s ID-om %id% ne postoje u izvornoj pošiljci.
